notes: Belgium are near full strength with only defender Zeno Debast a late doubt (leg injury, returned to training Sunday); no outfield suspensions or absences confirmed for Rudi Garcia's side. Senegal are without first-choice goalkeeper Edouard Mendy (knee sprain sustained vs Norway, left camp for further assessment), their only confirmed absentee, with Kalidou Koulibaly also a potential rotation casualty after an uncertain performance against Norway.
